test: C-Mod DisruptionBench, shot-level AUC, 41 physics-informed features
dataset: MIT PSFC Open Density Limit DB: 2333 shots (78d+2255c)
features: 6 raw + 6 rates + 4 physics (fGW, q95_proxy, ne/Ip, d_fGW/dt) + 25 multi-scale

run1_3ep_HID32.note: Undertrained (3ep, HID=32). Seed 2 failed to converge.

verdict.note: 26 test disrupted → AUC std ±0.05. Physics features (fGW, ne/Ip) improve over raw (v1.1) but gap to CCNN (0.974) is ~0.08.
